title: Sunny Studio near Central Park
description: Cozy studio on the 3rd floor, bright windows overlooking the park. Ideal for solo travelers or couples. Fast wifi and kitchenette included.

title: Modern Two-Bedroom Apartment
description: Spacious two-bedroom apartment with open-plan living room and fully equipped kitchen. Close to public transport and local shops.

title: Quiet Cottage in the Countryside
description: Charming cottage surrounded by nature. Perfect for weekend getaways. Large garden and BBQ area available.

title: Loft with Skyline View
description: Industrial-style loft on a high floor with panoramic city views. Large windows, modern furnishings, and a rooftop terrace.

title: Beachfront Studio
description: Small studio right on the beach with direct access to the sand. Sunrise views and a small balcony. Ideal for beach lovers.

title: Mountain Cabin Retreat
description: Rustic cabin near hiking trails with wood stove and large deck. Enjoy the mountain air and night skies away from city lights.

title: Downtown Studio for Business Travelers
description: Compact studio in the financial district. Fast internet, desk space, and easy access to public transit and conference centers.

title: Historic Townhouse with Garden
description: Elegant townhouse with period features and a private courtyard garden. Close to museums and cafes. Sleeps a family comfortably.
